metadata.description: Prantik's AI agent skills: Fable 5 operating profile and auto-skill-finder.

plugins.name: fable5-operating-profile
plugins.description: Run any model with Fable 5's operating profile: interleaved thinking, effort routing, autonomous agency, outcome-first communication, prompt-injection defense, and tool discipline.

plugins.name: auto-skill-finder
plugins.description: Universal AI skill router with dual-mode discipline: ponytail for code, caveman for chat. Auto-routes any prompt to the best installed skill.

plugins.name: codebase-security-audit
plugins.description: Audit a codebase for vulnerabilities and fix them: injection, broken access control / admin exposure, auth weaknesses, secrets, database exposure, PII leakage, XSS, SSRF/CSRF/CORS, deserialization, DoS/DDoS resilience, weak crypto, vulnerable deps. Recon → scan → triage → fix → verify.
